'''dhazhugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabtieh|zabtieh]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabtieh|zabtieh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhazhugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæzhigith|dhæzhigith]] || [[word:dhæzhigij|dhæzhigij]] || [[word:dhæzhigish|dhæzhigish]] || [[word:dhæzhigi|dhæzhigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuguth|dhazhuzhuguth]] || [[word:dhazhuzhuguj|dhazhuzhuguj]] || [[word:dhazhuzhugush|dhazhuzhugush]] || [[word:dhazhuzhugu|dhazhuzhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhazhuguth|dhazhuguth]] || [[word:dhazhuguj|dhazhuguj]] || [[word:dhazhugush|dhazhugush]] || [[word:dhazhugu|dhazhugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhazhufguth|dhazhufguth]] || [[word:dhazhufguj|dhazhufguj]] || [[word:dhazhufgush|dhazhufgush]] || [[word:dhazhufguf|dhazhufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhazhuguthu|dhazhuguthu]] || [[word:dhazhuguju|dhazhuguju]] || [[word:dhazhugushu|dhazhugushu]] || [[word:dhazhuguku|dhazhuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhazhuguth|dhazhuguth]] || [[word:dhazhuguj|dhazhuguj]] || [[word:dhazhugush|dhazhugush]] || [[word:dhazhugu|dhazhugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhazhuguthul|dhazhuguthul]] || [[word:dhazhugujul|dhazhugujul]] || [[word:dhazhugushul|dhazhugushul]] || [[word:dhazhugukul|dhazhugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhazhuguthuthu|dhazhuguthuthu]] || [[word:dhazhugujuju|dhazhugujuju]] || [[word:dhazhugushushu|dhazhugushushu]] || [[word:dhazhuguku|dhazhuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhazhuguthun|dhazhuguthun]] || [[word:dhazhugujun|dhazhugujun]] || [[word:dhazhugushun|dhazhugushun]] || [[word:dhazhugukun|dhazhugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhazhuguthuoro|dhazhuguthuoro]] || [[word:dhazhugujuoro|dhazhugujuoro]] || [[word:dhazhugushuoro|dhazhugushuoro]] || [[word:dhazhugukuoro|dhazhugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
